current_markdown:
# Requirement Brief

## Goal
Provide a new feature that calculates loan duration based on monthly rate, loan amount, and interest rate to support faster quoting.

## Business Context
The business needs faster quoting so end customers and internal staff can quickly obtain loan duration estimates without manual calculation.

## Users
- End customers
- Internal staff

## Functional Requirements
- The system must calculate loan duration using monthly rate, loan amount, and interest rate.
- The system must accept the required input values for the calculation.
- The system must return the calculated loan duration in a normal time format.
- No additional calculation rules are required beyond the stated inputs.

## Non-Functional Requirements
- Security
- Performance

## Risks and Dependencies
- No known risks or external dependencies currently identified.

## Open Questions
- None currently identified.
